title: Surgeon Vacancy at Fortis Healthcare Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Fortis Healthcare Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Fortis Healthcare Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Surgeon to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Fortis Healthcare Global Group:
Fortis Healthcare Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare Global Group!
